content: HA add-on config.yaml schema type system: str, str(min,max), bool, int, int(min,max), float, float(min,max), email, url, password, port, match(REGEX), list(val1|val2|...), device, device(subsystem=TYPE). Suffix ? makes field optional (no default needed). NO native entity_id selector - entity IDs are collected as plain str values. init: false required for s6-overlay. homeassistant_api: true for HA REST/WS. hassio_api: true for Supervisor API. services: [mqtt:want] for MQTT service discovery.
